reviews.review_msg: One of the greatest professors I have had the pleasure to learn under during my studies. A shinning beacon of academia, who genuinely pushed her students to achieve. She will be missed.

An erudite professor who exudes first-rate scholarly brilliance that has graced the halls of SFU over the last several decades with her sagacious academic preeminence, one of which will probably never be seen again. It is so depressing to see that this summer will be her last semester prior to her exalted retirement. A gem that'll be dearly missed

Boring slow lectures which just feel like rambling because she never has a complete thought. Group work where students come up with the exam questions. Very strict on citations but doesn't really care about content so marks are easy to earn.
She was really nice and class was always light.
